SEARCH
Package com.falkordb

Class FalkorDB.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.falkordb.FalkorDB.Builder
Enclosing class:
FalkorDB
public static final class FalkorDB.Builder extends Object
A fluent builder for a Driver, created via FalkorDB.builder().

All options are optional; unset options fall back to the same defaults as FalkorDB.driver(). Instances are not thread-safe and are intended to be configured and built on a single thread. Validation happens in build().

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Driver
    build()
    Validates the configuration and builds a driver.
    FalkorDB.Builder
    connectionTimeout(Duration connectionTimeout)
    Sets the connection (connect) timeout (default 2000 ms).
    FalkorDB.Builder
    credentials(String password)
    Sets a password for password-only (default user) authentication, clearing any previously set username.
    FalkorDB.Builder
    credentials(String user, String password)
    Sets the username and password used to authenticate.
    FalkorDB.Builder
    host(String host)
    Sets the server host (default "localhost").
    FalkorDB.Builder
    poolMaxIdle(int poolMaxIdle)
    Sets the maximum number of idle connections kept in the pool (default 8).
    FalkorDB.Builder
    poolMaxTotal(int poolMaxTotal)
    Sets the maximum connection-pool size (default 8).
    FalkorDB.Builder
    poolMaxWait(Duration poolMaxWait)
    Sets the maximum time to wait for a connection when the pool is exhausted (default: wait indefinitely).
    FalkorDB.Builder
    port(int port)
    Sets the server port (default 6379).
    FalkorDB.Builder
    socketTimeout(Duration socketTimeout)
    Sets the socket (read) timeout (default Duration.ZERO = no read deadline, so a long-running server query is never cut off client-side).
    FalkorDB.Builder
    ssl(boolean ssl)
    Enables or disables TLS (default false).

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • host

      public FalkorDB.Builder host(String host)
      Sets the server host (default "localhost").
      Parameters:
      host - server host; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      this builder

    • port

      public FalkorDB.Builder port(int port)
      Sets the server port (default 6379).
      Parameters:
      port - server port; must be in [1, 65535]
      Returns:
      this builder

    • credentials

      public FalkorDB.Builder credentials(String user, String password)
      Sets the username and password used to authenticate.
      Parameters:
      user - username
      password - password
      Returns:
      this builder

    • credentials

      public FalkorDB.Builder credentials(String password)
      Sets a password for password-only (default user) authentication, clearing any previously set username.
      Parameters:
      password - password
      Returns:
      this builder

    • ssl

      public FalkorDB.Builder ssl(boolean ssl)
      Enables or disables TLS (default false).
      Parameters:
      ssl - whether to connect over TLS
      Returns:
      this builder

    • poolMaxTotal

      public FalkorDB.Builder poolMaxTotal(int poolMaxTotal)
      Sets the maximum connection-pool size (default 8).
      Parameters:
      poolMaxTotal - maximum number of connections; must be at least 1
      Returns:
      this builder

    • poolMaxIdle

      public FalkorDB.Builder poolMaxIdle(int poolMaxIdle)
      Sets the maximum number of idle connections kept in the pool (default 8).
      Parameters:
      poolMaxIdle - maximum idle connections; must be non-negative and no greater than the pool's maxTotal
      Returns:
      this builder

    • poolMaxWait

      public FalkorDB.Builder poolMaxWait(Duration poolMaxWait)
      Sets the maximum time to wait for a connection when the pool is exhausted (default: wait indefinitely). A negative duration waits indefinitely; Duration.ZERO fails fast.
      Parameters:
      poolMaxWait - maximum borrow wait
      Returns:
      this builder

    • connectionTimeout

      public FalkorDB.Builder connectionTimeout(Duration connectionTimeout)
      Sets the connection (connect) timeout (default 2000 ms). Duration.ZERO means an infinite connect wait, which is allowed but not recommended.
      Parameters:
      connectionTimeout - connect timeout; must not be negative
      Returns:
      this builder

    • socketTimeout

      public FalkorDB.Builder socketTimeout(Duration socketTimeout)
      Sets the socket (read) timeout (default Duration.ZERO = no read deadline, so a long-running server query is never cut off client-side).
      Parameters:
      socketTimeout - read timeout; must not be negative
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public Driver build()
      Validates the configuration and builds a driver. Unset options use the same defaults as FalkorDB.driver(). Range validation happens in DriverImpl.create(java.lang.String, int, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, boolean, int, int, int, int, java.time.Duration).
      Returns:
      a new driver
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any option is out of range (see the individual setters)
